Blog_Title: Rupee hits lowest-ever intraday level of 95.80 against U.S. dollar
Blog_Content: the dollar index, which gauges the greenback’s strength against a basket of six currencies, was trading at 98.46, up 0.29%

Blog_Title: Adani Power seeks Rs 8,000 crore in debt to fund expansion
Blog_Content: The fundraising includes 50 billion rupees of public debt and around 30 billion rupees of loans from a group of lenders led by State Bank of India, the people said, asking not to be identified as the information is private.

Blog_Title: RBI Governor says fuel prices in India will rise if the West Asia crisis continues
Blog_Content: RBI Governor Sanjay Malhotra warns prolonged West Asia turmoil may force India to raise retail fuel prices, risking higher inflation and slower growth despite PM Modi austerity call

Blog_Title: India prioritises forex for crude, defence imports as govt hikes gold, silver duty
Blog_Content: India raises customs duty on gold, silver and platinum to curb non essential imports, conserve foreign exchange and protect the current account amid West Asia tensions.
